Video.summary: Explore the early church and investigate the roots of Christianity.
Video.title: From Jesus to the Creation of the Church

Image.alt: From Jesus to the Creation of the Church
From Jesus to the Creation of the Church
From Jesus to the Creation of the Church

Video.summary: Glimpse the first Christian communities in early Christian documents.
Video.title: The First Christian Institutions

Video.summary: Learn how believers adapted their faith to create a diversity of worship.
Video.title: Christianities in the Early Church

Video.summary: Learn how widespread Christian persecution led to the martyred saints.
Video.title: Persecution and Saints

Video.summary: See how Constantine\'s adoption of Christianity affected believers.
Video.title: Peace between Empire and Church

Video.summary: Examine the origin and impact of institutional revolutions in the church.
Video.title: Institutional and Doctrinal Developments

Video.summary: Examine the rich developments of Latin church theology.
Video.title: Latin Theology, Including Augustine

Video.summary: Learn how the church led in the chaos following the fall of Roman authority.
Video.title: Popes and Bishops in the Early Middle Ages

Image.alt: Popes and Bishops in the Early Middle Ages
Popes and Bishops in the Early Middle Ages
Popes and Bishops in the Early Middle Ages

Video.summary: Professor Koester introduces one of the most discussed books of all time: the book of Revelation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Apocalypse: Controversies and Meaning in Western History
Video.title: Revelation and the Apocalyptic Tradition

Video.summary: Investigate the world of the Hebrew prophets, whose writings influenced the author of the Apocalypse.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Apocalypse: Controversies and Meaning in Western History
Video.title: Apocalyptic Worldview in Judaism

Video.summary: Consider how the apocalyptic worldview was transformed by Christian writers in the New Testament.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Apocalypse: Controversies and Meaning in Western History
Video.title: Apocalyptic Dimension of Early Christianity

Video.summary: Go behind the legends to surmise what we know of the author of the Apocalypse, identified only as John.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Apocalypse: Controversies and Meaning in Western History
Video.title: Origins of the Book of Revelation

Image.alt: Origins of the Book of Revelation
Origins of the Book of Revelation
Origins of the Book of Revelation

Video.summary: Who was this book written for? Delve into the experiences of the men and women addressed by John.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Apocalypse: Controversies and Meaning in Western History
Video.title: Issues Facing Revelation's First Readers

Video.summary: Plunge into some of John's most vivid scenes, including the breaking of the seven seals.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Apocalypse: Controversies and Meaning in Western History
Video.title: God, the Lamb, and the Seven Seals

Image.alt: God, the Lamb, and the Seven Seals
God, the Lamb, and the Seven Seals
God, the Lamb, and the Seven Seals

Video.summary: Analyze the middle section of the Apocalypse from two contrasting perspectives.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Apocalypse: Controversies and Meaning in Western History
Video.title: Seven Trumpets, Temple, and Celebration

Video.summary: Turn to some of the most dramatic scenes in the Apocalypse, which deal with the problem of evil.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Apocalypse: Controversies and Meaning in Western History
Video.title: The Dragon and the Problem of Evil

Image.alt: The Dragon and the Problem of Evil
The Dragon and the Problem of Evil
The Dragon and the Problem of Evil

Video.summary: Meet one of the very first professional Black writers in the United States.
Video.title: Phillis Wheatley Peters, Founding Poet

Video.summary: Consider what we know today about Martha Washington's complicated life.
Video.title: Martha Washington, First Lady of the Republic

Image.alt: Martha Washington, First Lady of the Republic
Martha Washington, First Lady of the Republic
Martha Washington, First Lady of the Republic

Video.summary: Explore how stories about Sacagawea reflect changing American political and cultural landscapes.
Video.title: Sacagawea, Shoshone Diplomat and Guide

Video.summary: Learn how this undaunted, formerly enslaved woman advocated for herself and all women.
Video.title: Sojourner Truth, Crusader for Human Rights

Image.alt: Sojourner Truth, Crusader for Human Rights
Sojourner Truth, Crusader for Human Rights
Sojourner Truth, Crusader for Human Rights

Video.summary: How did Catharine Beecher educate a new generation of mothers, wives, and teachers?
Video.title: Catharine Beecher, Author and Educator

Video.summary: Meet Victoria Woodhull: the first female candidate to run for the US presidency.
Video.title: Victoria Woodhull, 1872 Presidential Candidate

Video.summary: How did Susan B. Anthony define the women's voting rights movement'and its leadership?
Video.title: Susan B. Anthony, Women's Rights Champion

Image.alt: Susan B. Anthony, Women's Rights Champion
Susan B. Anthony, Women's Rights Champion
Susan B. Anthony, Women's Rights Champion

Video.summary: The truth about Harriet Tubman is as extraordinary as the familiar myths about her.
Video.title: Harriet Tubman, Underground Railroad Leader
